channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: UK police investigate murder of politician Ann Widdecombe
item.description: Politician Ann Widdecombe was found dead with serious injuries, with police confirming a murder investigation underway

item.title: What’s behind Pakistan’s mass deportation of Afghans?
item.description: Islamabad cites national security concerns, returns thousands of undocumented migrants.

item.title: Thousands gather in Srebrenica to mark 31 years since genocide
item.description: Ten newly identified victims were buried as the more than 8,000 Bosnian Muslim men and boys killed were remembered.

item.title: ‘All we see is decay’: Covering the human toll of Venezuela’s earthquakes
item.description: As the death toll in Venezuela surges past 4,000, families continue to hold out hope that loved ones might be found.

item.title: US Rep Ro Khanna speaks out about being harassed by Israeli settlers
item.description: US Rep Ro Khanna speaks out about being harassed by Israeli settlers

item.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times reporters over coverage
item.description: Press freedom advocates and members of Congress have condemned the subpoenas as an attempt to 'threaten and intimidate'.

item.title: South Africa’s Jayden Adams, 25, dies after playing in FIFA World Cup
item.description: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder died after featuring in his nation's run to the World Cup round of 32.

item.title: US, Lebanese delegations meet to discuss Israeli ‘pilot zones’ withdrawal
item.description: Sources tell Al Jazeera that talks are focused on establishing mechanism for first of two so-called "pilot zones".

item.title: Evacuations as landslide threatens Indian village, construction firm blamed
item.description: A landslide during heavy monsoon rains tore through the Indian hill town of Shimla, forcing villagers to evacuate

item.title: Noskova defeats Muchova in Wimbledon final to record first Grand Slam title
item.description: Linda Noskova's victory over Karolina Muchova makes her the third Czech women's singles champion in past four years.

item.title: England vs Norway LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinal
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as England play Norway in a quarterfinal clash in Miami.

item.title: US lawmaker slams Israeli army after settlers detain him on Palestine trip
item.description: Lawmaker Khanna accuses soldiers of supporting the settlers, warning that Israeli forces made a 'huge mistake'.

item.title: FIFA is not an independent sporting organisation; it is a political tool.
item.description: Football fans around the world are only now finding out what Palestinians have long known.

item.title: Hormuz shipping in focus as Iran-US rhetoric heats up
item.description: Analysts say door to diplomacy still open despite exchange of attacks and threats.

item.title: Syrians optimistic but cautious as sanctions removal revives economic hopes
item.description: US decision to delist Syria as a 'state sponsor of terrorism' prompts cautious optimism among businesses and citizens.

item.title: Moldova’s president nominates businessman Vasile Tofan as prime minister
item.description: The announcement comes after the previous prime minister, Alexandru Munteanu, stepped down earlier this month.

item.title: Algeria and Mali restore diplomatic ties following yearlong rift
item.description: Relations begin to thaw as both countries reinstate ambassadors, reopen airspace closed to each other since April 2025.

item.title: UK police free suspect in ex-MP Ann Widdecombe murder investigation
item.description: The former government minister is believed to have been attacked a full day before her body was discovered.

item.title: Power cuts plunge Gaza hospitals into darkness as Israel’s attacks persist
item.description: Gaza is suffering from an energy crisis, affecting hospitals struggling to treat patients amid Israeli bombing.

item.title: What is going on in Yemen?
item.description: Tensions are rising in the battlefield and political sphere. Will the conflict reignite?

item.title: China prepares as Typhoon Bavi leaves Taiwan
item.description: China prepares as Typhoon Bavi leaves Taiwan

item.title: Zimbabweans return home amid xenophobic violence in South Africa
item.description: Zimbabweans return home amid xenophobic violence in South Africa

item.title: Sheinbaum takes on cartels, Trump and the legacy of 1968
item.description: Claudia Sheinbaum is trying to govern on her own terms — while dealing with Trump, cartels and AMLO's shadow.

item.title: Speedboat accident in southern Vietnam kills 15 Indian tourists
item.description: The Indian embassy says it has set up control rooms to respond to victims' families.

item.title: Land sold for Kushner-backed Albania resort suspected of forged deeds
item.description: Albanian prosecutors probe forged deeds tied to Kushner resort land as protests over the project intensify.
